title: Total supplement tax offsets 2015
description: Complete the total supplement tax offsets section in your supplementary tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, TaxPack, supplement, tax offsets, total tax offsets, supplement tax offsets

content_blocks.text: Did you claim any tax offsets at items T3, T4, T6, T7, T8 and T9?

rows: Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions

content_blocks.text: Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T3 , T4 , T6 , T7 , T8 and T9 on your tax return.
Write the amount from step 1 at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
Transfer the amount you wrote at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS to T on page 5 of your tax return.

items: Go to question A4 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions .
Go back to question T9 Other refundable tax offsets .

content_text:
## Did you claim any tax offsets at items T3, T4, T6, T7, T8 and T9?
No | Go to step 4, or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions
Yes | Go to step 1.
### Step 1
Add up all the tax offset amounts in the right-hand column of items T3 , T4 , T6 , T7 , T8 and T9 on your tax return.
### Step 2
Write the amount from step 1 at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS on page 16 of your tax return. Do not show cents.
### Step 3
Transfer the amount you wrote at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS to T on page 5 of your tax return.
### Step 4
Go to Total tax offsets .
### Where to go next
- Go to question A4 Amount on which family trust distribution tax has been paid .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions .
- Go back to question T9 Other refundable tax offsets .
